message:
feat(ops): add capacity governor with rch-aware workload control (ft-3681t.7.3)

Implements workload governance that detects system pressure (CPU, memory,
load average, I/O, concurrency) and routes heavy operations through rch
offloading or throttles/blocks them to prevent local contention under
swarm load. Supports operator overrides with expiry and category filtering.

22 unit tests covering all decision paths, serde roundtrips, telemetry
counters, and override lifecycle.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
